releases.description:
## 🧠 BojuBot — Claude Code Agentic File Management for Obsidian

> BojuBot puts a full Claude Code agent in Obsidian's sidebar. It reads, writes, reorganizes, and creates notes — and hands you the results inside Obsidian. No API key needed.

### 📋 Requirements
- Obsidian **desktop** (Windows, Mac, Linux — no mobile)
- [Claude Code CLI](https://claude.ai/download) installed and authenticated

### 📦 Installation
**Community plugin browser:** Open Obsidian → Settings → Community Plugins → Browse → search **BojuBot** → Install → Enable

**Manual:** Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below → place in `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/bojubot/` → enable in Obsidian settings

---


### Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue with Discord notifications by adding release-please to the notification process.

---
📖 [User Guide](https://www.scottkirvan.com/BojuBot/) · 💬 [Discord](https://discord.gg/TN6XJSNK5Y) · 🐛 [Report a Bug](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/BojuBot/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) · ✨ [Request Feature](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/BojuBot/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) · 📋 [Changelog](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/BojuBot/blob/main/notes/CHANGELOG.md)

## [2.4.0](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/ObsidiBot/compare/v2.3.0...v2.4.0) (2026-04-13)


### Features

* Canvas integration — read and generate .canvas files ([#28](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/ObsidiBot/issues/28)) ([cb7fda6](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/ObsidiBot/commit/cb7fda676af5b0e80949f0bd575d3e8272586ab0))
  * `canvasParser.ts` converts Canvas JSON to readable prose (groups, text cards, file cards, link cards, connections)

  * Canvas JSON schema documented in session orientation so Claude can read and generate valid `.canvas` files

* slash command menu ([#27](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/ObsidiBot/issues/27)) ([8af1902](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/ObsidiBot/commit/8af1902c2fb5edb241849e00aed4b3c8cd92be32))
  * **Toolbar button mode:** opens with a search box; type to filter, arrow keys navigate, Enter executes, Escape closes
  * **Inline trigger mode:** type `/` preceded by a space (or at start of input) to open a compact menu; any non-navigation key dismisses and keeps the `/` as literal text
  * **Built-in commands:** New session, Show history, Export session, Attach file, Open context file, Refresh context, Open settings
  * **Prompt templates:** `.md` files in the configured commands folder appear automatically; optional YAML frontmatter (`category`, `description`) controls grouping and subtitle

## [1.3.0](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0) (2026-03-27)

## 🧠 Cortex — Claude Code Agentic File Management for Obsidian

> Cortex puts a full Claude Code agent in Obsidian's sidebar. It reads, writes, reorganizes, and creates notes — and hands you the results inside Obsidian. No API key needed.
> → [Full feature list and User Guide](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex#readme)

### 📋 Requirements
- Obsidian **desktop** (Windows, Mac, Linux — no mobile)
- [Claude Code CLI](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview#native-install-recommended) installed and authenticated
 
### 📦 Installation
- **Recommended (beta):** Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) → Add Beta Plugin → `ScottKirvan/Cortex`
 
- **Manual:** Download `cortex-<version>.zip` below → extract → move `cortex/` folder to `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/` → enable in Obsidian settings
 
> ⚠️ **Public beta** — not yet in the Obsidian community plugin browser. Feedback welcome on [Discord](https://discord.gg/TN6XJSNK5Y) or via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/issues).
 
---
 
- ### 🆕 Changes in this Release

### Features

* drag-and-drop session manager sorting ([61afdf2](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/commit/61afdf2e5de0e8753cee7b78238b981e64d8aed4))
* new command: "Cortex: Refresh Session" ([b45e2a9](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/commit/b45e2a9b615e696060f7deea3cff06930c76fa54))
* run-command discovery, UI polish, and bug fixes ([b6821dd](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/commit/b6821ddbea5dda91615ce4e61f70bfc174e91020))
* session manager now shows which session is active ([06cce74](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/commit/06cce747e71acb71aeadbaf7efe81e3e0620f031))
* UI Bridge run-command action with settings command browser ([#47](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/issues/47)) ([2121ddc](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/commit/2121ddc2939bc2c7c354a62fb847d8bea6cc15c6))


### Bug Fixes

* renaming a session in the session manager changes the name in the chat panel immediately now ([1740193](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/commit/1740193113daf65b3f5f2d6a3f271ebcffb5b986))
* session duplication after Obsidian restart ([6c2b889](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/commit/6c2b8890326c811c8f4a347afc06f6ed78c96403))

---
📖 [User Guide](https://www.scottkirvan.com/Cortex/notes/USER_README.html) · 💬 [Discord](https://discord.gg/TN6XJSNK5Y) · 🐛 [Report a Bug](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) · ✨ [Request Feature](https://github.com/ScottKirvan/Cortex/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)
